title: codengine task definitions
description: The neutral description of the task functions found in a source module: their named parameters, produced by a per-language analyzer and consumed by tooling (e.g. the VS Code extension). Version 1.

language.description: Language of the analyzer that produced this document (e.g. "ts", "py").

acceptsExtra.description: Whether the function receives input keys beyond its declared params (e.g. Python **kwargs, a TS index signature).

kind.description: Neutral kind, mapped from the native type.

required.description: True when the parameter has no default value.

nullable.description: True when the type admits null/None.

default.description: The literal default value, when the parameter has one. Absent for required params (and for non-literal defaults).
